data.title: Previously, the giant whale deposited 10 million USDC to HyperLiquid to close its long ETH position and bought 1,000 HYPE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Hypurrscan data, the whale who had previously recharged 10 million USDC to HyperLiquid and opened a 10x ETH long order closed the ETH long position and successively purchased 1,000 HYPEs, with an average purchase price of US$41.838.

data.title: Ant International responds to application for stablecoin license in Hong Kong: Submit as soon as possible after relevant channels are opened
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In response to reports that Ant International is planning to apply for stablecoin licenses in Hong Kong and Singapore, Ant International responded that it is accelerating investment and expanding cooperation in global treasury management, and putting our AI, blockchain and stablecoin innovations into real and reliable large-scale applications. 
"We welcome the Hong Kong Legislative Council's passage of the Stablecoin Bill, and will submit an application as soon as the bill takes effect on August 1 and the relevant channels are opened. We hope to contribute more to Hong Kong's construction of a future international financial center." Ant International said. (The Paper)

data.title: Tether CEO: Bitcoin is “mathematical currency”
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paolo Ardoino, CEO of stablecoin issuer Tether, posted on the X platform that mathematics is the only certainty in the entire universe. Bitcoin is Math Money.

data.title: Brazil proposes national Bitcoin reserve with bill PL 4501/2023
data.description:
12-6-2025 – Christened Bill PL 4501/2023, has ignited optimism within Brazil’s Economic Development Committee, marking a potential turning point in the nation’s financial strategy. Crafted by Federal Deputy Eros Biondini, the proposal advocates for the establishment of a national Bitcoin reserve, dubbed ‘RESBit,’ which would permit up to 5% of Brazil’s foreign exchange reserves to [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/brazil-proposes-national-bitcoin-reserve-with-bill-pl-4501-2023/

data.title: Singapore Police and StraitsX Collaborate to Combat Cryptocurrency Money Laundering
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Singapore police have partnered with local cryptocurrency platform StraitsX to conduct an enforcement operation targeting money laundering through cryptocurrency accounts. The operation took place from May 13 to May 30.

Authorities reported the seizure of over 200,000 Singapore dollars, with 49 individuals under investigation. The group includes 35 men and 14 women, aged between 18 and 58. Preliminary investigations suggest that these individuals opened and transferred their cryptocurrency accounts or Singpass accounts for rewards ranging from 400 to 3,000 Singapore dollars. They typically communicated with unknown individuals via platforms like Telegram or WhatsApp, providing account screenshots, personal information, and access permissions as instructed. These accounts were subsequently used for laundering proceeds from scams.

The police highlighted that collaboration with StraitsX has enhanced their ability to detect suspicious financial activities. Through this partnership, advanced technological solutions were introduced, enabling the successful identification and tracking of multiple suspicious accounts.

data.description:

data.title: US Vice President Vance: I have talked with Musk and Trump and hope that the two sides can get along well
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DogeDesigner, US Vice President Vance said about the Musk and Trump incident: "The president wishes Musk all the best and does not want to be at odds with him for a long time. I have talked to Musk and the president and hope to ensure that Musk supports the president's agenda publicly and privately. I will continue to do so."

data.title: US Senators Probe Stablecoin Plans by Facebook Parent Meta
data.description:
Senators Warren and Blumenthal are demanding answers from Meta over renewed stablecoin plans, warning of risks to competition and privacy.
source: https://decrypt.co/324791/us-senators-probe-stablecoin-plans-meta

data.title: Crypto Market Faces Potential Short-Term Adjustment
data.description: According to Odaily, CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr has revealed a noticeable increase in long position closures and active short trading volume within the past hour. This situation represents a typical 'soft reversal point' following an upward trend. While the funding rate remains positive, the number of open contracts is decreasing, suggesting a potential short-term adjustment or consolidation below $108,000.

data.title: A whale deposited 10 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 10x leveraged ETH long order with a liquidation price of $2,201
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Hypurrscan data, a whale deposited 10 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 10x leveraged ETH long order with a position value of approximately US$46 million. The liquidation price is US$2,201, and the current profit is US$237,000.

data.title: Swedish health technology company H100 Group announced that it raised $10.6 million to buy Bitcoin, and its stock price soared 45%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Swedish health technology company H100 Group AB announced that it has raised 101 million Swedish kronor (about 10.6 million US dollars) to accelerate its Bitcoin reserve strategy. After the announcement, the company's stock price rose 45%. H100 Group said that the proceeds from the financing will be used to purchase Bitcoin, and it is expected to increase its holdings by about 67.1 Bitcoins. Together with the existing 13.95 Bitcoins, the total holdings will reach 81.85 Bitcoins. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Syria gains Binance access after sanctions eased, opening doors to crypto inclusion
data.description:
12-6-2025 – For years, Syrians watched the cryptocurrency boom from afar, constrained by sanctions that barred them from major platforms like Binance. As the local currency plummeted in value, many relied on remittances from relatives abroad or turned to crypto to safeguard their savings, yet were stifled by restricted access. Now, with Syria removed from [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/syria-gains-binance-access-after-sanctions-eased-opening-doors-to-crypto-inclusion/

data.title: KOL Andrew Tate made 76 trades on Hyperliquid, with a win rate of only 35.53%.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Andrew Tate, a KOL with tens of millions of fans on the X platform, made 76 transactions on Hyperliquid, with only 27 winning transactions - a winning rate of 35.53% and a total loss of $583,000. He currently holds a long position in ETH with a leverage of 25 times.

data.title: CryptoQuant analyst: BTC is expected to see a short-term adjustment or consolidate below $108,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr, there is a clear long position closing and active short trading volume within the current hour. This is a typical "soft reversal point" after an upward trend: the funding rate remains positive but the number of open contracts decreases, and a short-term adjustment or consolidation below $108,000 is expected.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci says Solana will Seamlessly Substitute Banks for IPOs
data.description:
SkyBridge’s Anthony Scaramucci, while speaking at the Solana Accelerate conference, made some key predictions about the Solana ecosystem. Scaramucci most notably affirmed that bringing Initial public offerings (IPOs) on-chain is possible and allows non-traditional users affiliated with banks to purchase IPOs through their wallets. “You can actually crowdsource the public offering through the tokenization process. ” […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/anthony-scaramucci-says-solana-will-seamlessly-substitute-banks-for-ipos-2/
